headline: INCIDENT: DELTA A339 OVER ATLANTIC ON MAY 2ND 2026, ENGINE PROBLEM

meta.narrative: A DELTA AIRLINES AIRBUS A330-900, REGISTRATION N429DX PERFORMING FLIGHT DL-59 FROM LONDON HEATHROW,EN (UK) TO BOSTON,MA (USA), WAS ENROUTE OVER THE ATLANTIC OCEAN ABOUT 380NM EAST OF ST. JOHN'S, NL (CANADA) WHEN THE CREW DECIDED TO TURN AROUND AND RETURN TO LONDON DUE TO AN ENGINE PROBLEM.

headline: INCIDENT: UNITED B752 NEAR NEWARK ON APR 30TH 2026, PITOT HEATER NOT WORKING

meta.narrative: A UNITED AIRLINES BOEING 757-200, REGISTRATION N14102 PERFORMING FLIGHT UA-188 FROM NEWARK,NJ (USA) TO LISBON (PORTUGAL), WAS CLIMBING OUT OF NEWARK WHEN THE CREW STOPPED THE CLIMB AT 5000 FEET REPORTING A PITOT HEATER WAS NOT WORKING.
